Commercial catering equipment · established 1984

BA Catering Equipment

Equipping you to cater for your customers

Commercial kitchen design, supply, installation and servicing across London and the South East — from a single appliance to a complete kitchen, delivered from conception to finished article.

Request a quote Call 020 8658 1994
What we supply

Equipment for every commercial kitchen

Leading brands, expertly specified, installed and maintained — new and fully reconditioned.

Cooking

Ranges, ovens & combi steamers

Gas and electric cooking suites, combi ovens and prime cooking from Rational, Blue Seal and Falcon.

Ventilation

Extraction & canopy systems

Bespoke stainless canopies and ventilation, designed and fitted to keep your kitchen safe and compliant.

Refrigeration

Fridges, freezers & cold rooms

Reliable refrigeration from Gram, Williams and Foster — from undercounters to full cold rooms.

Warewashing

Dishwashers & glasswashers

Fast, hygienic warewashing from Hobart, sized and plumbed to match your covers.

Fabrication

Stainless steel fabrication

Made-to-measure tabling, sinks, shelving and servery counters, fabricated to fit your space exactly.

How we help

A complete service, from first sketch to aftercare

We take a project all the way through — designing the space, supplying the equipment, installing it properly and keeping it running for years to come.

Design

Kitchen layouts from initial concept to full CAD drawings, planned around your workflow, space and budget.

Learn more

Supply

UK agents for leading brands, offering new and fully reconditioned equipment at competitive prices.

Learn more

Installation

Full fit-out including fabrication, gas, electrics, canopies, hygienic walls and flooring — done to standard.

Learn more

Service & maintenance

Planned maintenance contracts, spare parts and emergency call-outs to keep your kitchen running.

Award-winning project
Featured work

Harris Academy, from concept to completion

We designed, supplied and installed a complete commercial kitchen for Harris Academy — planned around the school's daily volumes and finished to a standard recognised with a Civic Trust Award.

  • Full design and CAD drawings agreed with the client
  • Cooking, refrigeration, warewashing and stainless fabrication
  • Ventilation, services and a compliant, easy-clean finish
See more of our work
